title: Customising the gantt view
excerpt: Is it possible to group items from different boards on a Gantt view?

posts.author: cwood (Colin Wood)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to group items from different boards on a Gantt view?

posts.author: AronK (Aron-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cwood!

Did you still need help with this? It sounds like the Gantt Widget on a dashboard would be what you’re looking for. While you would not be able to add items from different boards to a Gantt View, this is definitely possible with the Gantt Widget.

How many boards are you looking to pull from? As a heads up, depending on the plan you have, you will be able to connect a certain number of boards to a dashboard.

I hope this helps
-Aron
